_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in designing security controls based on cybersecurity principles and tenets.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI systems, attack surface analysis, and control gap identification.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.557), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.495).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.474). Shared vocabulary: [security, skill]. DCWF-only terms [based, controls, cybersecurity, designing, principles, tenets] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, control] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.898 (P=0.910, R=0.887). P exceeds R by 0.024 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (61.8%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in designing security controls based on cybersecurity principles and tenet" and "Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI sy". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.577 > STS 0.474 (gap +0.103). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [security, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.0%. Shared tokens: [security, skill]. DCWF-only: [based, controls, cybersecurity, designing, principles, tenets]. WIDAI-only: [ai, analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, control].
